heading: Capital
label: 281 Capital
text: No Federal reserve bank shall commence business with a subscribed capital less than $4,000,000.
notes: CodificationSection is comprised of part of the thirteenth par. of section 2 of act . Some of the other provisions of the thirteenth par. are classified to , and some were not included in the Code. For classification of other pars. of section 2 of this Act, see Codification note set out under .Dec. 23, 1913section 224 of this titlesection 222 of this title
